ai_summary: The Great Eastern Shipping Company Limited has taken delivery of a 2015-built Long Range 2 Tanker, 'Jag Laxman', expanding its fleet and positioning for growth in the tanker segment. This acquisition was notably financed entirely through internal accruals, reflecting strong financial health and efficient capital management. The company's fleet now comprises 41 vessels with nearly 100% capacity utilization, indicating immediate operational leverage from the new asset while also planning for further fleet optimization through the pending sale of another tanker.
